_provenance.artifact: interpretation classes per blocker (decisions/005) — FROZEN once used for training
_provenance.derived_by: Claude Fable 5 (laptop-side), 2026-07-05, by hand from each blocker's description + resolution + example_questions in third_party/hil-bench/harbor_swe/<task>/shared/ask-human-data/blocker_registry.json @ 352d14c
_provenance.audit: all 13 blockers hand-derived and reviewed (full audit; the 3-task sample is smaller than the 20-blocker random audit decisions/005 prescribes for the full set)
_provenance.semantics: class 0 is always the registry's canonical resolution; other classes are the competing interpretations implied by the description and example questions. 'signatures' are case-insensitive substrings a committed trace exhibits; 'anchors' identify the DECISION (topic), not the resolution.
_provenance.scope: All 20 collected tasks (swe_0..swe_26). swe_0/1/10 hand-derived 2026-07-05; swe_11-26 derived by Opus workflow 2026-07-08 (per-task drafter grounded in registry+traces), 3 LLM-verified (swe_14/15/17), all 17 passed a deterministic anchor-leak repair (77 anchors that uniquely predicted one class were dropped; every blocker retains >=3 anchors) + owner hand-audit + empirical labeler validation.
_provenance.scope_extension_2026_07_18: 40 new tasks (swe_3-9, swe_27-59) derived 2026-07-18 by Claude Fable 5 from each blocker's description + resolution + example_questions in the registries (REGISTRY-ONLY: no collected traces exist for these tasks yet; signatures to be empirically reviewed against the first collection, per the swe_11-26 precedent). Audited by scripts/audit_class_artifact.py: 0 errors per batch (schema, canonical-at-0, no anchor==signature, no cross-class signature duplication); single-class anchor/signature substring overlaps eliminated; known limitation: matcher is case-insensitive so case-only class distinctions (e.g. swe_49 ClickHouse casing) are not derivable. Original 20-task entries byte-identical (FROZEN, gates already ran on them).
_provenance.leak_repair_2026_07_18: 8 anchors that were verbatim-identical to a class signature dropped from 5 frozen blockers (swe_1/showall; swe_10/as-is,verbatim; swe_26/allowed_tags; swe_13/inventory,host_group_vars,vars_files; swe_14/relative path), found by scripts/audit_class_artifact.py. Robustness proven before repair: raw-h diagnostic on wta-a0-v2-14b identical with/without these anchors (models/v2_value_diag_leakfix.log) — none of the 5 blockers ever produced a measured fork. Every blocker retains >=3 anchors. Enforced from now on by harness/contract/test_class_artifact.py (zero artifact-leak errors).
